description: Module for performing basic velocity analysis using the scVelo protocol on ScanpyUtilities processed datasets
author: GenePattern Team
plan:
## scVelo GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
scVelo is a GenePattern module that Module for performing basic velocity analysis using the scVelo protocol on ScanpyUtilities processed datasets

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 17 parameters:
- Required: h5ad, Velocity.Mode, min_shared_counts, n_top_genes, recalculate_highly_variable_genes, Enforce.Normalization, N_PCs, N_Neighbors, Differential.Kinetics.Analysis, Embedding, Clustering, Cluster.Resolution, Regression.Keys, Plot.Batches, Save.Plot.Type, output.file.base
- Optional: Marker.Genes

### 3. Command Line
```
python /build/compute_scvelo.py -i <h5ad> -m <Marker.Genes> -v <Velocity.Mode> -s <min_shared_counts> -t <n_top_genes> -g <recalculate_highly_variable_genes> -f <Enforce.Normalization> -c <N_PCs> -n <N_Neighbors> -d <Differential.Kinetics.Analysis> -e <Embedding> -l <Clustering> -r <Cluster.Resolution> -k <Regression.Keys> -b <Plot.Batches> -p <Save.Plot.Type> -o <output.file.base> -j <job.cpuCount>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: genepattern/scvelo\:v1

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: Marker.Genes
parameters.description: A list of marker genes to plot on the embedded graph

parameters.name: Velocity.Mode
parameters.description: Mode for performing the velocity estimation. Supports 'deterministic', 'stochastic' (default), or 'dynamical' methods for computing splicing kinetics.

parameters.name: min_shared_counts
parameters.description: Filter genes by minimum shared counts across cells

parameters.name: n_top_genes
parameters.description: Top N variable genes to use for velocity calculation

parameters.name: recalculate_highly_variable_genes
parameters.description:
If highly_variable_genes have already been calculated externally, force their re-computation with Scanpy using the selected method.
If set to 'false' and the highly_variable_genes key isn't found in the data, the calculation will be automatically performed using the Seruat_v3 method.

Selecting options other than 'false' will force re-calculation of PCA, the KNN graph, and UMAP embeddings.

parameters.name: Enforce.Normalization
parameters.description:
Typically, the top level counts matrix used by most tools such as scanpy and seurat will already be normalized.
scVelo requires that the separate spliced and unspliced counts layers used only by velocity calculations also be normalized.
Setting Enforce.Normalization to "all" will cause scVelo to force normalization of all three layers of the data.
Setting Enforce.Normalization to "velocity" (default) will only normalize the velocity specific spliced and unspliced layers.
Setting Enforce.Normalization to "none" will use the dataset as is for all layers.
Note\: selecting "all" will force re-calculation of PCA, the KNN graph, and UMAP embeddings.

parameters.name: N_PCs
parameters.description: Number of principal components used in calculation of the gene moments of spliced/unspliced abundances.

parameters.name: N_Neighbors
parameters.description: Number of nearest neighbors used in calculation of the gene moments of spliced/unspliced abundances.

parameters.name: Differential.Kinetics.Analysis
parameters.description: Perform differential kinetics analysis on the basis of dataset clustering using dynamical velocity estimations.

parameters.name: Embedding
parameters.description: Select the type of embedding used in ScanpyUtilities.

parameters.name: Clustering
parameters.description: Autodetect existing clusters in the dataset, or run clustering using choice of leiden or louvian algorithms. If no clustering is detected with "autodetect_existing", "leiden" will be used.

parameters.name: Cluster.Resolution
parameters.description: Resolution to use if running leiden or louvain clustering on the dataset.

parameters.name: Regression.Keys
parameters.description:
Any keys to regress out of the dataset (i.e. batch) using scanpy.pp.regress_out().
Should be specified as a non-quoted comma separated list.

Regressing out a key will force re-calculation of PCA, the KNN graph, and UMAP embeddings.

parameters.name: Plot.Batches
parameters.description: Produce individual velocity plots for each batch in the dataset (if present).

parameters.name: Save.Plot.Type
parameters.description: Save velocity plots as png or svg (or pdf; not recommended due to pdf element count limitations).

parameters.name: output.file.base
parameters.description: Output basename for velocity calculation results.
